svg.text: · W/S = PITCH (invert in Settings → Flight → Inverted Pitch)
· Q/E alone = pure bank (no yaw); A/D = yaw + bank-enhanced turn
· Hold Q+A simultaneously for continuous barrel roll left
· Hold E+D simultaneously for continuous barrel roll right
· Any flight key cancels an active maneuver computer sequence
· Autopilot disengages when you press W / S / A / D / Q / E
